page: Alibaba Cloud ecs.se1.14xlarge is an x86_64 architecture server instance powered by the KVM hypervisor. It features 56 dedicated physical CPU cores with 1 thread per core, providing 56 vCPUs. The instance is configured with 480.0 GB of system memory, yielding a memory-to-core ratio of 8.57 GB per core.
This instance does not include local storage or integrated GPUs. Network connectivity is supported by a baseline bandwidth of 10 Gbps. It does not include complimentary public IPv4 addresses.

Given the high memory-to-vCPU ratio of over 8 GB per core, this instance is classified as memory-optimized. It is designed for workloads requiring substantial memory capacity without the need for local storage or GPU acceleration, such as large-scale in-memory databases, caching layers, and enterprise applications. The dedicated CPU allocation ensures consistent processing performance for memory-intensive tasks.
description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.se1.14xlarge is a memory-optimized server instance built on the x86_64 architecture and managed via the KVM hypervisor. It features 56 dedicated physical CPU cores with a single thread per core, delivering 56 vCPUs of dedicated compute capacity. The instance is equipped with 480.0 GB of system memory, establishing a high memory-to-core ratio of 8.57 GB. It does not include local storage or GPU hardware, and network performance is anchored by a 10 Gbps baseline bandwidth. This resource profile is designed for memory-intensive enterprise workloads, such as in-memory databases and large-scale data processing, where high RAM capacity and dedicated CPU resources are required, while external storage solutions are utilized for data persistence.

tagline: A memory-optimized server featuring fifty-six dedicated physical cores and four hundred eighty gigabytes of RAM for memory-intensive enterprise workloads.
